rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF YAT MAN SIK
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Approval Of Compromise And Settlement Agreement
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) The underlying petitions that led to this settlement agreement were filed by the Public Administrator (petition for instructions) and Shean Mih Yung Temple (petition under Probate Code §850, which was against the estate); however, the Public Administrator is not a party to the settlement agreement. 2) Yi Shi, the other heir of this estate, has not signed the settlement agreement. Petitioner alleges that Yi Shi and his children have signed "disclaimer of interests… in favor of the claims asserted by the Petitioner." Disclaimers have not been filed, and it is unclear what their effect would be here.

rulings.Case Title: GUARDIANSHIP OF GIOVANNI ALEXANDER HERNANDEZ
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) Request for fees by attorney has not been adequately supported, pursuant to CRC 7.751(b). The declaration filed by attorney on 8/22/19 and 8/27/19 fail to specify the categories of services performed and amounts charged for each category. 2) Attorney requests $2,767 in costs. Attorney was asked to provide an itemization, along with justification for messenger fees that totaled more than $50 per instance, but only invoices were provided. The invoices are replete with references to rejected filings, incorrect/defective filings, and seemingly unnecessary rush filings.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF FREDDIE PATRICK WILLIAMS JR
rulings.Calendar Matter: PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
rulings.Rulings: continued to october 1, 2019. Proof of Service of the Notice of Hearing was filed, but the Notice of Hearing form did not contain the mandatory language in Probate Code section 12201. new notice must be mailed no less than 15 days prior to the continued hearing date and the new proof of service must be filed. in addition, no supplement has been filed addressing the issues in teh email sent to Counsel on 8/16/19 at 12:18 p.m.
